s1.Query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?
s1.Args: [42]
s2.Query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ? AND status = ?
s2.Args: [42 active]
s3.Query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?
s3.Args: [alice'; DROP TABLE users; --]
s4.Query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1 AND status = $2
s4.Args: [42 active]
s5.Query: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = :name1 AND status = :name2
s5.Args: [42 active]
s6.Query: SELECT '{json}' as label WHERE id = ?
s6.Args: [42]
s7.Query: SELECT 1
s7.Args: []
s8.Query: SELECT * FROM events WHERE user_id = $1 AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '$2 days'
s8.Args: [7 84]
dump: [query="DELETE FROM cache WHERE key = ?" args=[alice'; DROP TABLE users; --]]
